_comment: Maintained for the datpaq CLI. The CLI shows ONLY these interfaces in discovery commands (datpaq api, datpaq sample, splash). Inactive interfaces are still callable directly (e.g. `datpaq aircraft lookup-by-tail` works regardless) so existing scripts don't break. Source of truth is the admin dashboard's `isActive` field — keep this file in sync. Eventually a script can regenerate this from the DB; for now it's hand-edited.
